title: ICRISAT-Private Sector Partnership in Hybrid Parents Research. An ICRISAT Success Story
abstract:
Recent years have witnessed remarkable growth
in private sector investment in crop improvement,
research and development, especially in crops
that provide hybrid cultivar options. The sorghum
and pearl millet hybrid seed industry has a wellestablished
base in India and has derived
immense economic benefits from hybrid parents
research at ICRISAT. Pigeonpea hybrids are also
now becoming a commercially viable proposition.
